description: Apache Kerby is a Java Kerberos implementation that provides interoperable client, KDC, and related security facilities. The kerb-client artifact supplies client-side APIs for interacting with a Kerberos KDC, including AS and TGS exchanges and support for Kerberos pre-authentication mechanisms.

Apache Kerby is a Java Kerberos implementation that provides interoperable client, KDC, and related security facilities. The kerb-client artifact supplies client-side APIs for interacting with a Kerberos KDC, including AS and TGS exchanges and support for Kerberos pre-authentication mechanisms.
